title: BoxLang Lint Configuration
description: Schema for .bxlint.json, generated from the BoxLang LSP lint configuration model.

diagnostics.description: Map of rule ID to rule settings. Keys are rule IDs (see Lint Rules section). Each value is an object with optional 'enabled' (boolean) and 'severity' (string) fields.

include.description: Workspace-relative glob patterns. When non-empty, only matching files are analyzed. Supports * (segment), ** (recursive), ? (single char). Always use forward slashes.

exclude.description: Workspace-relative glob patterns. Files matching any exclude pattern are never analyzed, even if they match an include pattern. Evaluated after include.

mappings.description: Map of virtual path prefix (e.g. "/models") to absolute or relative filesystem path used by the LSP during analysis and indexing. Paths are resolved relative to the workspace root.

enabled.description: Enables the experimental formatter for the workspace when present.

formatting.description: Formatting configuration shared across IDEs for the workspace. The experimental formatter toggle lives under formatting.experimental.enabled.

params.description: Rule-specific parameters. Supported keys depend on the rule.

enabled.description: Set to false to disable the rule entirely.

severity.description: Overrides the diagnostic severity for the rule.
